case_title: RAMIRO JERONIMO VS. TUTTA LA VITA, INC., DBA MANGIA FUOCO RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JERONIMO, RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT TUTTA LA VITA, INC., DBA MANGIA FUOCO RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
